title: [Better End] Craftable Flavolite Pedestal
body:
Flavolite Pedestal crafting for [**Better End**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)

***[Warning]:*** *This does not make Pedestals breakable in survival !* 

If you mess up the pedestal placement... You are either out of luck or its up to the server OP's to help.
